description: codecamp-advantage: a full-stack web dev bootcamp for interns with near-zero JS experience. 18 curriculum modules from dev environment setup through cloud deployment, using fork-based exercises, LLM PR review, and GitHub Issues practice. Exercises progressively mirror Reading Advantage architecture patterns.
deviation_notes: Rescoped from 'teach monorepo patterns' to 'teach web dev from fundamentals'. Existing schema/domain/router/UI code retained and extended.
